query: SELECT address, SUBSTRING(imageUrl, 1, 60) as imageUrl_preview FROM properties WHERE address LIKE '%Jessica%' OR address LIKE '%Alderwood%' OR address LIKE '%Hall%' OR address LIKE '%Windsong%' OR address LIKE '%Chevron%' OR address LIKE '%Prospector%' OR address LIKE '%Enchanted%' ORDER BY address;
